# ITLight Software House

> Professional software house from Poland specialising in mobile app development (Flutter), website development (Angular, WordPress) and custom web systems (Laravel). Serving clients in Poland, Czech Republic, Slovakia and Lithuania. Founded 2024.

## Core Services

- **Mobile App Development**: Cross-platform apps in Flutter for iOS and Android — from simple MVPs to complex business applications. Price range: 5 000–300 000+ PLN.
- **Website Development**: Landing pages, corporate websites, e-commerce in Angular and WordPress. Price range: 2 000–30 000 PLN.
- **Web Systems & APIs**: Custom backend systems, SaaS platforms, REST APIs in Laravel. Price range: 10 000–150 000 PLN.

## Pages

- [Home](https://itlight.eu/): Main landing page — services overview, technology stack, pricing packages, client testimonials, FAQ
- [Portfolio](https://itlight.eu/portfolio.html): Completed projects — PaidWork, Kosiek, Misty Bytes, Bestpoints, Vefio, Vocale, Finzer, BEU
- [Contact](https://itlight.eu/contact.html): Free project quote within 24h — phone +48 786 497 374, email kontakt@itlight.eu
- [Career](https://itlight.eu/career.html): Job openings — Flutter developer, Frontend developer
- [Blog](https://itlight.eu/blog.html): Expert content about mobile app development and IT technologies
- [Privacy Policy](https://itlight.eu/privacy_policy.html): Privacy policy — data processing, cookies, GDPR rights

## Service Pages

- [Strony Internetowe i E-commerce](https://itlight.eu/strony-i-ecommerce.html): Professional websites, landing pages, e-commerce stores. WordPress, Astro, custom — technology matched to goals and budget. Free quote within 24h.
- [Aplikacje Mobilne, Webowe i Systemy IT](https://itlight.eu/aplikacje-i-systemy.html): Mobile apps (Flutter), web systems (Angular, Laravel), admin panels and MVPs. From idea to working product.
- [Rozwój i Utrzymanie Oprogramowania](https://itlight.eu/rozwoj-i-utrzymanie.html): Maintenance packages, bug fixing, performance optimisation, feature development. Packages from 399 PLN/month (Basic) through 899 PLN/month (Professional) to 1999 PLN/month (Enterprise). Custom packages available.

## Blog Articles

- [Ile kosztuje aplikacja mobilna w 2026? Kompletny przewodnik](https://itlight.eu/blog-koszt-aplikacji-mobilnej.html): Comprehensive mobile app cost guide — simple app 5k–15k PLN, MVP 15k–40k PLN, business app 40k–100k PLN, advanced 100k–300k+ PLN. Covers: cost factors, Flutter vs native cost savings, own team vs software house, 5 tips for getting a good quote, maintenance costs.
- [Flutter vs React Native – co wybrać w 2026?](https://itlight.eu/blog-flutter-vs-react-native.html): Detailed comparison of cross-platform mobile technologies — performance (Flutter: AOT compilation, React Native: JSI), ecosystem, developer costs, UI consistency, when to choose each. ITLight recommends Flutter for new projects.
- [AI w tworzeniu aplikacji – poradnik 2026](https://itlight.eu/blog-ai-w-tworzeniu-aplikacji.html): How to leverage AI in app development — chatbots, personalisation, process automation. Where AI delivers the biggest ROI and implementation costs in 2026.
- [Ile kosztuje strona internetowa w 2026?](https://itlight.eu/blog-koszt-strony-internetowej.html): Website pricing guide — WordPress, custom, SaaS comparison. Concrete prices and tips on saving without sacrificing quality.
- [PWA vs natywna aplikacja – porównanie 2026](https://itlight.eu/blog-pwa-vs-natywna-aplikacja.html): Progressive Web App vs Flutter vs native Swift/Kotlin — cost, performance and device API access comparison. Decision tree included.

## About ITLight

ITLight Software House was founded in 2024 in Poland. The team builds mobile apps, websites and web systems primarily using Flutter (mobile), Angular (web frontend), Laravel (backend) and WordPress (CMS).

**Languages served**: Polish, English, Czech, Slovak, Lithuanian.

**Contact**:
- Email: kontakt@itlight.eu
- Phone: +48 786 497 374
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/it-light/about/

**Pricing packages**:
- Start (landing page): 2 000 PLN
- Business (corporate website): 5 000 PLN
- E-commerce: 8 000 PLN
- Mobile MVP: 15 000 PLN
- Custom mobile app: from 30 000 PLN
- SaaS platform: from 50 000 PLN

## Technical Stack

- **Mobile**: Flutter / Dart (iOS + Android + Web from single codebase)
- **Frontend**: Angular, HTML/CSS/JavaScript
- **Backend**: Laravel (PHP), REST API
- **CMS**: WordPress
- **Databases**: MySQL, PostgreSQL, Firebase
- **Cloud**: AWS, Google Cloud, Firebase

## FAQ (from website)

Q: Ile trwa realizacja aplikacji mobilnej?
A: Prosty MVP to 6–10 tygodni, standardowa aplikacja biznesowa 3–6 miesięcy, złożona platforma SaaS 6–12 miesięcy.

Q: Czy pracujecie z klientami z Czech, Słowacji i Litwy?
A: Tak — obsługujemy klientów z Polski, Czech, Słowacji i Litwy w ich języku ojczystym.

Q: Czy mogę zobaczyć przykładowe realizacje?
A: Tak — portfolio dostępne na stronie: https://itlight.eu/portfolio.html

Q: Jak wygląda proces współpracy?
A: 1. Bezpłatna wycena (24h) → 2. Analiza wymagań → 3. Design i prototyp → 4. Development iteracyjny → 5. Testy → 6. Wdrożenie → 7. Wsparcie
